sutta: monks if among in residents follow the course of 5 things he becomes of great service to his residents what 5 he is virtuous he is much learned he repairs things broken and dilapidated dilapidated and when many monks of the sangha have come monks from various parts of the country he speaks to the householders who approach saying see good sirs many monks from various parts of the country have arrived do good now is the time to make merit and he attains to the 4 states of jannah verily monks if among in residents follow the course of 5 things he becomes of great service to his residents and this suit dies about a man who is very useful who is a useful monk to have in a monastery 1 who is virtuous 1 who is much learned in the dhamma vinaya 1 who helps to repair the kuti's and the huts and anything broken and dilapidated dilapidated and old and also when many monks arrive and then he encourages the lay people to support them and the last 1 he can attain to the jaanas so that he's not the 1 who is scatterbrained the next 2 times
